The Pressure Point Behind
Every Rider's Arm Pump

The spot between your thumb and index finger is called Hegu (LI4) — one of the most sensitive pressure points in your hand. When gripping handlebars, pressure builds here and radiates up through your forearms. That's arm pump. Riders have tried everything to solve it — some even get surgery. Tommy Grips redistribute that pressure so you can ride without the burn.

✦ Fight Arm Pump
✦ Reduce Numbness
✦ More Control
✦ Ride Longer

Riders have been chasing a fix for arm pump forever. Some guys spend thousands on surgery. These grips actually make a difference — and they're $30.
